name: release-update
domain: moai-adk-go dev-only maintainer tooling — Claude Code upstream change tracking
source_request: 분리: dev-only 메인테이너 devkit 단일 진입을 3개 독립 harness(release-update / github / release)로 분리한다. release-update만 비-상호작용 research fan-out(CC release-notes version-delta sweep)을 가지므로 Runner+manifest를 보유하고, github/release는 순수 human-gated specialist로 Runner/manifest가 없다(Runner 비대칭).

specialists.description: Claude Code upstream change tracker. Collects CC release notes since last analyzed version, classifies by impact tier, cross-references official docs, generates update plan or umbrella SPEC, syncs docs-site 4-locale + README, opens PR via manager-git. Human-gated: user approval + PR creation. The non-interactive per-version research sweep is fanned out by the Runner.
